title: A Primer on Full-Screen Living - Leo Babauta
content: Link: A Primer on Full-Screen Living - Leo Babauta Interesting ... > The other day while visiting a friend, she offered her dog a bone. The dog wanted the bone, but didn’t want to drop the toy animal in his mouth to get the bone. > “Jack, you can’t have both at the same time,” my friend said. > Most of us are like Jack: we want more than one thing at once. We’re not willing to let go of one thing in order to do another.
